description: Test that trigger.github library returns a non-empty payload with full library details

expectedLibraries.name: ballerinax/trigger.github
expectedLibraries.description: The GitHub Trigger module allows you to listen to following events occur in GitHub.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: The user that triggered the event.

type.name: record {|string display_login?; string avatar_url?; int id?; string login?; string gravatar_id?; string url?; anydata...;|}

fields.description: The repository object where the event occurred.

type.name: record {|string name?; int id?; string url?; anydata...;|}

fields.description: The type of event.Events uses PascalCase for the name

typeDefs.name: PushEvent
typeDefs.description: Represent GitHub push event

fields.name: ref
fields.description: The full git ref that was pushed. Example:

fields.name: before
fields.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref before the push.

fields.name: after
fields.description: The SHA of the most recent commit on ref after the push.

fields.description: The repository where the event occurred.

fields.description: The user who pushed the commits.

fields.name: sender
fields.description: The user that triggered the event.

fields.description: Webhook payloads contain the organization object when the webhook is configured for an organization or the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

typeDefs.name: IssuesService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to a GitHub issue is received. 
Available actions: onOpened, onClosed, onReopened, onAssigned, onUnassigned, onLabeled, and onUnlabeled

typeDefs.name: IssueCommentService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event is fired upon receiving a comment on a pull request or a GitHub issue.
Available actions: onCreated, onEdited, and onDeleted

typeDefs.name: PullRequestService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to a GitHub pull request is received.
Available actions: onOpened, onClosed, onReopened, onAssigned, onUnassigned, 
onReviewRequested, onReviewRequestRemoved, onLabeled, onUnlabeled, and onEdited

typeDefs.name: PullRequestReviewService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when Choreo recieved a new event from GitHub related to a pull request review.
Available actions: onSubmitted, onEdited, and onDismissed

typeDefs.name: PullRequestReviewCommentService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event is received from GitHub when a comment is added to a pull request review's unified diff view.
Available actions: onCreated, onEdited, and onDeleted

typeDefs.name: ReleaseService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to a GitHub release is received.
Available actions: onPublished, onUnpublished, onCreated, onEdited, onDeleted, onPreReleased, and onReleased

typeDefs.name: LabelService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to labels is received.
Available actions: onCreated, onEdited, and onDeleted

typeDefs.name: MilestoneService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to GitHub milestones is received.
Available actions: onCreated, onEdited, onDeleted, onClosed, and onOpened

typeDefs.name: PushService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a push event is received.
Available action: onPush

typeDefs.name: ProjectCardService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new event related to project cards is received.
Available actions: onCreated, onEdited, onMoved, onConverted, and onDeleted
